title: Card Coverage Comparison
description: Which gift card (CADO, UpCadhoc, Galeries Lafayette) covers the broadest network of physical stores and online merchants for different purchase categories in France?
narrative: The user aims to contrast the affiliations and acceptability of major French multi‑brand gift cards. They need a concise comparison of each provider’s partner count, geographic reach, category coverage (e.g., fashion, beauty, leisure), and restrictions such as non‑acceptance in catering or services. Relevance demands sources that detail the partner networks, geographical footprints, accepted categories, and any usage limitations.

title: Quick Lamb Tagine
description: How can I prepare an easy, time‑saving lamb tagine that still delivers authentic North‑African flavors?
narrative: The user seeks a concise, low‑prep lamb tagine recipe suitable for week‑night cooking, focusing on minimal ingredients, short cooking time, and clear step‑by‑step instructions while preserving the traditional spice profile.

title: Lotus Elise Purchase Criteria
description: What used Lotus Elise models meet my specific engine, mileage, price, and emission requirements?
narrative: The user is looking to buy a used Lotus Elise and wants specific details: a gasoline engine, manual gearbox, year after 2000, mileage under 50,000 km, price not exceeding €35,000, and CO₂ emissions below 180 g/km. Relevance is judged by listings that provide complete technical specifications, current market pricing, and clear evidence of vehicle condition; ads lacking these details or offering higher prices are excluded.

title: Veal Paupiette Adaptations
description: How can the classic veal paupiettes recipe be modified for quick cooking, dietary restrictions, or ingredient substitutions while preserving flavor?
narrative: The user seeks nuanced variations of the traditional veal paupiettes that make the dish easier to prepare, lower in salt or alcohol, or compatible with allergens (e.g., nut‑free, gluten‑free). Relevance requires detailed substitution lists (e.g., wine replaced by lemon‑water, addition of mushrooms or cream, use of alternative herbs), explicit cooking times and techniques, and a clear comparison to the standard recipe. Practical, step‑by‑step guidance that highlights the impact on taste, texture, and nutrition is essential.

title: UV Car Protection
description: How can I protect my car's interior and occupants from UV rays while ensuring compliance with safety laws?
narrative: The user is searching for comprehensive guidance on protecting a vehicle’s interior from ultraviolet exposure. Relevance is judged by content that explains legal transparency limits for front and rear windows, compares self‑tinted solar films versus sun visors, discusses installation methods and durability, addresses safety concerns (maintaining visibility, preventing glass breakage hazards), and considers child protection and cost‑efficiency. The user also expects practical advice on when to choose tints versus visors, how to maintain the film, and what materials are best for long‑term UV and heat resistance.

title: Nearest Petit Bateau & Services
description: Where is the closest Petit Bateau store that stocks women’s t‑shirts and offers free returns?
narrative: The user is looking for a nearby Petit Bateau shop that carries women’s t‑shirts, and wants confirmation that the store accepts free returns and participates in the loyalty program. Relevant documents should include store location information, product availability (women’s t‑shirts), return policy details, and loyalty program participation.

title: Renault Resale Comparison
description: Where can I find the best discounted prices for a new Renault vehicle, comparing employee sales, Elite Auto deals, and other financing options?
narrative: The user is looking to purchase a new Renault at a reduced price and wants to evaluate all available avenues: the employee sale program, the discounted offers through Elite Auto, and alternative financing arrangements such as LOA (Lease with Option of Purchase). Relevance is measured by documents that detail specific discount percentages, monthly installments, total costs (including insurance and purchase option), customization options, warranty policies, and any experiential factors (e.g., delivery time, customer satisfaction). The information should enable the user to compare price, cash‑flow impact, and overall benefits across the different selling channels.

title: E‑Book Order Process
description: Where can I find detailed information about ordering, paying for, and receiving e‑books from the School of War, including format options, delivery times, and security measures?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive guidance on purchasing e‑books from the War School’s online store: how to select file formats (epub2, mobi, azw3), create an account, use secure payment via Société Générale, understand post‑purchase delivery schedules (post office, Chronopost, print‑on‑demand delays), and review privacy policies and cookie usage that affect transaction and account data handling. Relevance is judged by the presence of explicit instructions and details on each of these steps within the source documents.

title: Right of Option Eligibility
description: Which conditions qualify a job‑seeker for the right of option on the ARE when returning to a better‑paid job?
narrative: The user seeks detailed eligibility criteria for exercising the right of option to receive an increased ARE after re‑employment. Relevancy should include the 130‑day (910‑hour) work requirement, the minimum daily allowance threshold (€20), the required 30 % increase over the remaining rights, distinctions between contracts before and after 1 Nov 2019, and how the option interacts with other unemployment entitlements (e.g., reloading rights, special solidarity allowance). The answer should also clarify documentation needed, statutory deadlines, and the impact of voluntary resignation versus involuntary loss of employment.

title: AXA Online Access
description: How can I log into my AXA insurance and AXA Bank client spaces, recover a lost password, and verify that I am using the correct secure URLs?
narrative: The user is a policyholder or bank customer wanting step‑by‑step guidance for authenticating to the proper client area (https://client.axa.fr for insurance, axabanque.fr for banking), troubleshooting login issues such as forgotten passwords, checking that the login page uses HTTPS and matches AXA’s official domain, and understanding the key differences between the insurance and banking client spaces.

title: EV Purchase Incentives
description: Which financial incentives exist for buying an electric vehicle in France and how do they modify the purchase cost?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about all French subsidies applicable to electric car purchases—including the green bonus, conversion premium, retrofit premium, second‑hand bonus, and regional aids—as well as registration tax exemptions. Relevance is determined by documents that explain eligibility criteria, the monetary amount per vehicle category, how subsidies are calculated in relation to the vehicle price and battery cost, and the time frames in which these incentives remain valid.

title: Eating Infected Tomatoes
description: Is it safe to eat tomatoes that have been infected with downy mildew?
narrative: The user is a home gardener who has recently observed downy mildew on tomato fruits and wants to know whether it is safe to consume the affected tomatoes, how to handle them for storage or canning, and whether the seeds can be salvaged. Relevance is judged by evidence on health risk, USDA canning guidelines, and seed‑treatment recommendations.

title: Padre Pio & Nibiru Links
description: Which documented evidence connects Padre Pio’s prophecies to the Nibiru‑based apocalyptic scenarios presented by contemporary New Age sources?
narrative: The user seeks to evaluate whether Padre Pio’s predictions, often quoted as aligning with Nibiru, volcanic eruptions, pole shifts, and the "three days of darkness", are consistently supported by primary documents or credible secondary analyses. Relevance is determined by sources that (1) quote Padre Pio’s prophecies directly, (2) discuss Nibiru or pole‑shift phenomena, (3) provide historical or scientific context, and (4) critically assess the veracity and timeline of these events.

title: Legal Streaming of La Folle
description: Where can I watch ‘La Folle Histoire de l’Espace’ legally, and what safe online options exist for French and English versions?
narrative: The user wants to locate officially licensed streaming or download services that offer the French comedy film “La Folle Histoire de l’Espace.”  Relevance should be based on verifiable, non‑pirate platforms such as official streaming sites, DVD/Rental providers, or subscription services that have cleared the rights for the film. The answer must exclude unverified torrent or free‑streaming sites (e.g., casual links promoted in informal forums), and it should highlight any region‑specific availability (e.g., Canada, France, US). If privacy or security of a platform (e.g., FILMube) is a concern, the response should note the privacy policy terms, data collection practices, and whether the service adheres to standard legal compliance for media distribution. The intent is to guide the user toward legitimate, safe, and potentially subscription‑based options, covering both dubbed and subtitled audio tracks.

title: DGSE Portrayal Accuracy
description: How accurately does the series *Le Bureau des Légendes* depict the operations and structure of France’s DGSE?
narrative: The user wants to evaluate the realism of the show, seeking evidence from production notes, expert commentary, and critical reviews that discuss how closely the series mirrors real DGSE practices, terminology, and internal dynamics, while distinguishing dramatized elements from factual procedures.

title: Prévaloir Verb Nuances
description: I seek a thorough explanation of the conjugation patterns and contextual use of the French verb 'prévaloir', covering all tenses, moods, and idiomatic expressions.
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive guide that includes the full conjugation table of 'prévaloir', discussion of its usage in various moods (indicative, conditional, subjunctive, etc.), examples from literature and contemporary texts, and notes on common pitfalls such as confusing it with the English verb 'prevail' or misusing the passive form. Additionally, the user seeks insights into how to distinguish between the senses of "to prevail" and "to exist/occur" in different contexts.

title: Mongolian Nomad Episodes
description: Which Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu episodes feature visits to Mongolian nomads, and what are the celebrity hosts and broadcast dates?
narrative: The user is researching specific episodes that explore Mongolian nomadic cultures. They want the episode number, the celebrity featured, the exact broadcast date, and any supporting context. Relevant items must mention Mongolian nomads, a celebrity, and episode details.

title: Truffle Potato Diet
description: Which recipes or preparation methods for black truffle potato crush are suitable for a diet during diarrhea?
narrative: The user is looking for ways to incorporate the frozen black truffle potato crush into a diet that aligns with medical recommendations for managing diarrhea. Relevant information should discuss cooking the product with mild, cooked vegetables or proteins, avoid raw or high‑fiber ingredients, and suggest appropriate portion sizes, fats, and hydration strategies. Documents that reference the product’s usage, preparation times, and nutrient content, as well as health guidance on foods to eat or avoid during diarrhea, are considered relevant. Items that do not address these criteria or describe unrelated uses of the product are irrelevant.

title: Espace Charenton Rentals
description: Where can I find up-to-date details about renting rooms at Espace Charenton in Paris for corporate events?
narrative: User is looking for accurate, current information on availability, capacity, pricing, and booking procedures for rooms at Espace Charenton. Relevance requires documents that describe the space, its amenities, event types, and contact information, as well as any schedule of upcoming events or booking policies.

title: Green Pricing Flex
description: What green electricity supplier offers the lowest cost, full transparency, no contract commitment, and dynamic pricing using an app and a smart meter?
narrative: I am a residential consumer looking to switch to a green electricity supplier. I need a provider that offers the most competitive price—cheaper than the regulated tariff and with no hidden fees—while guaranteeing 100 % renewable energy via guarantees of origin. The contract must be non‑binding (no long‑term commitment and easy termination), and the supplier should support dynamic pricing so I can buy electricity when the market price and green mix are cheapest, using a mobile app synchronized with my Linky meter. I also value responsive customer service and a clear, transparent billing statement. Relevance is judged by price competitiveness, renewable certification, contract flexibility, smart meter integration, and customer support quality.

title: EV6 Purchase Decision
description: What are the key factors to consider when deciding to buy a Kia EV6, including price, battery range, charging network, and EU incentives?
narrative: The user is evaluating whether to purchase a Kia EV6 and wants a comprehensive comparison of its trim levels, battery options, WLTP range, charging speeds, pricing (including subsidies and taxes), availability of the Ionity network, and any recent recall impacts. Relevance requires details that address these criteria and help the user make an informed buying decision.

title: One‑Way Faro Rental
description: I need a one‑way car rental from Faro Airport to Lagos that offers free cancellation, no hidden fees, and optional GPS and child seat insurance.
narrative: The user is planning a road trip in the Algarve and wants to compare car‑hire options that allow picking up at Faro Airport and dropping off in Lagos, finishing within a specified date range. Relevance requires that the rental include a transparent total price (no surprise fees), a free cancellation policy up to 24 hours before pickup, and the ability to add optional extras such as GPS and a child seat. The answer should prioritize listings that provide these features and highlight any special insurance offerings or added benefits.

title: Airport‑to‑Station Rental
description: I want to rent a car from Nantes Atlantic Airport to Nantes South Station, including GPS and full insurance, under 50 € per day.
narrative: Searching for the most affordable agency offering a one‑way self‑service pickup at the airport and drop‑off at the train station, with optional extras like GPS and insurance, and flexible cancellation policy.

title: Integrated Potato Disease Management
description: How can I develop a year‑long, environmentally‑sound management plan that balances crop rotation, resistant varieties, and selective fungicide use to control the main fungal pathogens (late blight, downy mildew, Rhizoctonia, silver scab) while minimizing impact on soil health and non‑target organisms?
narrative: The user is a small‑scale potato grower experiencing recurrent losses from multiple fungal diseases. They need guidance on selecting disease‑resistant varieties, determining optimal timing for planter and pre‑harvest fungicide applications, and designing rotation sequences that limit pathogen inoculum buildup. Relevance criteria include detailed symptom descriptions, environmental thresholds (temperature, humidity), fungicide effectiveness and application intervals, and crop‑specific recommendations for companion plants and cultural practices such as sub‑soil ventilation and residue management. The desired information should integrate these factors into a cohesive, actionable plan suitable for a Mediterranean‑type climate and inclusive of economic considerations.

title: Beaujolais Cru Comparison
description: I want to compare the various Beaujolais crus to choose which one to buy for an upcoming dinner party.
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the characteristics, taste profiles, and recommended pairings of each Beaujolais cru, as well as price ranges and availability, to make an informed purchase decision. Relevance should be judged by including grape variety, terroir, production methods, tasting notes, and marketing details pertinent to each crus. Exclude generic regional descriptions or unrelated content.

title: Boat Shoe Selection
description: Which men's boat shoes offer the best combination of quality, comfort, and price for coastal or casual wear?
narrative: The user is researching boat shoes and wants to compare models based on brand, material (full leather, nubuck), construction features (non‑slip Technigrip sole, laces or non‑lace), waterproofing, durability, and price. Relevant documents should include product specs, user reviews, and purchase options that address these criteria.

title: Electric Family SUV
description: What affordable Renault electric SUV offers at least five seats within a €55 000 budget for city and occasional highway use?
narrative: The user seeks a cost‑effective, fully electric Renault SUV suitable for a family, requiring a minimum of five seating capacity, a practical range for urban commuting with occasional longer trips, and optional safety and infotainment features. Relevant records should provide detailed specifications, pricing, and configuration options for such models, while non‑electric, lower‑seat, or higher‑priced vehicles should be considered irrelevant.

title: Corfu Car Hire
description: Find the best car rental deals in Corfu that offer budget options, unlimited mileage, free cancellation, and clear pricing.
narrative: The user wants to compare multiple car rental agencies in Corfu (Sixt, Europcar, Budget, etc.) and aggregator sites (EasyTerra, Liligo) to identify the cheapest daily rates for a selected vehicle category (Mini/Economy). They require all‑inclusive pricing (no hidden fees), unlimited mileage, and free cancellation up to 48 hours. The search should include pick‑up locations (airport versus city) and highlight agencies with high customer ratings and supportive customer service.

title: Family Car Rental Insurance Options
description: What are the insurance and protection options available for a family car rental on Reunion Island, including coverage details, costs and free perks such as child seats or babysitting services?
narrative: A family planning a holiday in Reunion Island wants to compare car rental agencies (Budget, My Car Loc, ADA, SG Services) to find the best insurance and protection packages that cover child safety, unlimited mileage, and free child‑related equipment. Relevance criteria include coverage limits, included free items, additional services (e.g., babysitting or vehicle parking), and cost differences among agencies.

title: Mid‑Range German SUV
description: I’m looking for a mid‑range German SUV that balances comfort, fuel efficiency, and resale value for daily commuting and weekend adventures.
narrative: The user intends to buy a mid‑size or compact SUV from German manufacturers (BMW, Audi, Mercedes‑Benz, VW, or Skoda) that suits both city driving and light off‑road use. Relevance criteria include vehicles priced within a mid‑range band (≈CHF 30k–65k), recent models with low mileage, availability of hybrid or efficient gasoline engines, proven resale depreciation curves, and comprehensive safety/comfort package. Documents should provide dealer listings, price breakdowns, mileage, and estimated market value; irrelevant entries such as non‑German brands, luxury‑class models, or vehicles outside the price/mileage limits should be omitted.

title: Cyclist Accident Compensation
description: What steps should I take to claim full compensation after a bicycle collision on public roads, and how does the Badinter law affect my claim?
narrative: The user is a cyclist who suffered injuries in a public road accident and wants detailed guidance on the legal and procedural steps for compensation, including eligibility under the Badinter law, types of damages (bodily, aesthetic, loss of earning), calculation methods, and criteria for selecting a lawyer or expert. Relevant documents must cover the legal framework, compensation scales, the role of medical experts, and advisory services.

title: Accessible Event Planning
description: Where can I find details on how to arrange a visit to Arkéa Arena that supports people with reduced mobility or disabilities?
narrative: The user intends to learn about accommodations, accessibility services, and reservation procedures for attending events at Arkéa Arena. Relevance requires information on dedicated contact lines, transport/parking options, disability-friendly amenities, and any event-specific accessibility policies.

title: Indre Women Farmers 1970s
description: Which archival materials document rural women farmers' experiences in Indre‑et‑Loire between 1969 and 1976 during Menie Grégoire’s broadcasts?
narrative: The user seeks primary sources—letters, broadcast transcripts, envelope annotations—capturing rural women farmers’ daily lives and voices in the late 1960s and early 1970s, to analyze gendered agricultural experiences and media representation during Menie Grégoire’s radio program.

title: Ombudsman Dispute Process
description: How can I resolve a billing dispute with my energy supplier through the National Energy Ombudsman, and what steps and documentation are required?
narrative: User seeks detailed guidance on the dispute resolution workflow, prerequisites before contacting the Ombudsman, eligibility criteria, timeframes, and post-recommendation actions. Relevance: documents describing procedures, timelines, eligibility, and example workflow.

title: Student Device Decision
description: Which device—laptop PC, tablet, or 2‑in‑1 hybrid—best supports a student's coursework and note‑taking needs?
narrative: The user is a student preparing to return to class and wants to choose a portable computer that balances performance, battery life, note‑taking capability, and cost. Relevant documents discuss tablets (Huawei MatePad), 2‑in‑1 laptops (Asus ROG Flow X13), and note‑taking solutions.

title: Silver Print Evolution
description: Looking for a detailed historical overview of silver-based photographic printing techniques from the 19th century to modern practices, including their chemical processes and technical advancements.
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on the chronology and technical details of silver print methods, such as wet collodion, dry plate, gelatin bromide, and modern silver gelatin processes, hoping to compare techniques, understand chemical compositions, and trace innovations over time. Relevance criteria include documents that describe specific silver-print processes, historical milestones, chemical formulations, and technical descriptions, and exclude purely digital or non-silver methods.

title: Vegetarian Leek Quiche
description: I’m searching for a quick, vegetarian leek quiche recipe that can be prepared in around 60 minutes or less.
narrative: The user wants a recipe that excludes meats and dairy where possible, uses simple ingredients (leeks, eggs or a plant‑based alternative, milk or cream, and a cheese or cheese substitute), has minimal prep and cooking steps, and is suitable for a light, flavorful meal within an hour.

title: Car Game Availability
description: Where can I find free online car games that are still playable after Flash was discontinued?
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date information on free online car games that are currently accessible on modern browsers. Relevance requires documents that list existing HTML5 or other compatible car game sites, indicate platform support, describe the type and age suitability of the games, and mention any known replacements or alternatives for flash‑based car games that have been removed.

title: Distance Eligibility
description: What distance criteria determine eligibility for Pôle emploi's mobility aid for job interviews, training, or competitions?
narrative: The user is a registered jobseeker who needs to decide if a distant job interview qualifies for mobility assistance. They require the exact distance thresholds—typically at least 60 km round‑trip or two hours—along with special rules for overseas departments (20 km). They also need to know how contract type (CDI, CDD of ≥ 3 months) and benefit level affect eligibility, as well as the cost coverage limits for travel, meals, and lodging.

title: SFR Client Portal
description: How can I log in to my SFR client area and retrieve my invoices?
narrative: The user is an SFR mobile/ADSL customer who needs to authenticate into the online client area to manage their account, particularly to view, download, or pay invoices. Relevant information includes login procedures, password recovery steps, email linking guidance, and article tutorials on accessing and handling invoices.

title: Oil Lamp Selection
description: Which oil lamp is best for outdoor use in terms of durability, fuel flexibility, and ease of maintenance?
narrative: The user seeks an oil lamp suitable for camping or outdoor lighting, evaluating aspects such as build quality, fuel compatibility (kerosene, soybean, paraffin), wick type, glass durability, and safety features. Relevant results will mention specific lamp models, materials, and accessory options like wicks and replacement glass.

title: Car Rental Cost Comparison
description: How do I calculate the total cost and insurance when renting a car in Madeira, and which agencies provide the best value?
narrative: I’m planning a 7‑day trip to Madeira and need to decide on a car rental. I want a clear breakdown of all fees—daily rate, airport surcharge, insurance options (incl. deductible and zero‑deductible), fuel, delivery and return costs—along with guidance on suitable vehicle class for the island’s terrain. I also want to know which agencies (e.g., Europcar, Avis, local providers) offer the most competitive all‑inclusive deals and reliable customer service. Relevant information must cover price comparison, insurance details, rental duration, vehicle suitability, and agency reputation.”}

title: Potato Boiling
description: How should I boil potatoes—peeled or with skin, which variety, and what cooling technique—to preserve nutrients, achieve desired texture, and ensure safety?
narrative: The user seeks evidence-based guidance on boiling potatoes, balancing culinary outcomes (e.g., mash, side dish, roasting precursors) with nutritional retention and safety. Relevance is judged on sources that compare peeled versus skin‑on cooking, discuss effects of cooling in residual water or cold water, compare different potato varieties (new, roseval, bintje), and address sprout toxicity and proper storage. Experimental data or rebuttals of common myths are highly valuable.
